# ProCon LLC

> ProCon LLC is a family-owned custom home builder and remodeling contractor in Duluth, Minnesota, owner-led by Dan Bruckelmyer with nearly three decades of hands-on experience building and renovating homes across Northern Minnesota.

## About
ProCon LLC is a residential general contractor in Duluth, MN, established in 2023 and owner-led by Dan Bruckelmyer, who has worked in construction since 1997. The company is family-operated across two generations and specializes in custom home construction, additions, and remodeling. ProCon is a licensed Minnesota contractor (license #QB807406), insured, and backs its work with a workmanship guarantee.

## Services
- Custom Home Construction: Single-family homes built from the footings up; most finish in 8–12 months, insulated above MN code minimums. -> /services/custom-home-construction
- Multi-Family & Duplex Construction: Duplex and multi-family builds, typically 10–14 months. -> /services/duplex-construction
- Vacation Home Construction: Seasonal and lake homes across the North Shore region. -> /services/vacation-homes
- Garages & Outbuildings: Detached garages in 4–8 weeks; standard two-car is 24 ft × 24 ft. -> /services/garages-outbuildings
- Kitchen Remodeling: Full kitchen renovations, same crew start to finish. -> /services/kitchen-remodeling
- Bathroom Remodeling: Bathroom renovations, including sauna spaces. -> /services/bathroom-remodeling
- Home Additions: Added bedrooms, baths, and saunas worked into existing homes. -> /services/home-additions
- Deck Construction: Decks in Arbor Wood Co. thermally modified wood (USA-sourced); most built in 1–3 weeks. -> /services/deck-construction
- Exterior Upgrades: Siding and exterior renovation. -> /services/exterior-upgrades
- Window & Door Installation: Replacement windows and exterior doors. -> /services/window-door-installation

## Service Area
Based in Duluth, MN 55804. Serves Duluth and Northern Minnesota.

## Areas Served (dedicated pages)
- Duluth, MN: /areas/duluth-mn
- Hermantown, MN: /areas/hermantown-mn
- Cloquet, MN: /areas/cloquet-mn
- Two Harbors, MN: /areas/two-harbors-mn
- Proctor, MN: /areas/proctor-mn
- Esko, MN: /areas/esko-mn
- Hibbing, MN: /areas/hibbing-mn
- Grand Rapids, MN: /areas/grand-rapids-mn
- Virginia, MN: /areas/virginia-mn
- Also serving: Rice Lake, Lakewood Township, Arnold, Carlton, Fredenberg Township, and Grand Lake Township.

- Free estimates, with a response within 24 hours.

- Insured
